nx_follow.description: Follow a Steam game to receive its news in a specific channel.

messages.success: Future news for the game `{game_name}` will now be posted in {channel}.
messages.exist: The game `{game_name}` is already being followed in {channel}.
messages.not_found: This game is not available for news tracking.

nx_unfollow.description: Unfollow a Steam game to stop receiving its news.

messages.success: The game `{game_name}` has been unfollowed and will no longer post in {channel}.
messages.not_followed: This game is not currently being followed.

nx_publish.description: Publish the latest news of a followed Steam game in its associated channel (for testing).

messages.success: The latest news for the game `{game_name}` has been successfully published in {channel}.
messages.not_found: No news could be found for the game `{game_name}`.

nx_list.description: List all followed Steam games with their respective channels.

messages.not_followed: No games are currently being followed.

nx_reset.description: Unfollow all Steam games to stop receiving any news.

messages.success: The following games will no longer be followed: {games}.
messages.not_followed: No games are currently being followed.

messages.success: The langage has been updated to `{language}`.
messages.not_updated: The language could not be updated.
